critic_notes: IND.2.2 SPS (Speicherprogrammierbare Steuerung): 3 questions on backup-before-change, SPS hardware description, time synchronization. All quotes in full source but far outside the manifest char range [2060069..2074812] — actual SPS content is around char ~1914000. Manifest boundaries for IND.2.* are systematically misaligned. Content is semantically correct for SPS. Correct answers supported; distractors wrong. Question 002 has null anforderung_type.

issues.detail: Fragment `Steuerungsprogramme und Konfigurationen SOLLTEN immer gesichert werden, bevor an ihnen etw...` matches source near manifest boundary (within 30k-char buffer); manifest char_start/char_end drift.

Fragment `Eine SPS verfügt über digitale Ein- und Ausgänge, ein Echtzeitbetriebssystem (Firmware) so...` found in full source but outside manifest range + buffer — manifest boundaries significantly misaligned with actual chapter content.
Kompendium question has baustein_id but null anforderung_type (baustein_id is chapter-level, not a specific .A# requirement).

Fragment `Die Systemzeit SOLLTE automatisch über eine zentrale automatisierte Zeitsynchronisation ei...` matches source near manifest boundary (within 30k-char buffer); manifest char_start/char_end drift.
